name: Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage into small wedges.
2. Place half of the cabbage in a blender and add the water, carrot, and pepper.
3. Blend quickly until smooth, then turn off the blender and drain any excess liquid.
4. Blend the remaining cabbage separately, using enough liquid to achieve the desired consistency.
5. Drain again if needed for texture.
6. Mix the blended cabbage with mayonnaise dressing.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 26
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little (version 1985)
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
